ADMISSIONS
Sri Eshwar
A Campus full of POSITIVE VIBES!
If you dream of studying in a college with an active coding vibe or in an ecosystem of thinkers and problem solvers, participating and winning hackathons along with your peers, then stop right here!
Is Sri Eshwar the right fit for your academic and career dreams?
If you have big dreams for your future career and are willing to upskill yourself to what the industry needs, and put in the required effort to get placed in a top company with a high package, then Sri Eshwar is the place for you.
If your dream is to go abroad for your higher studies or to study further in the premiere institutes in India, then again Sri Eshwar may be the place for you.
If you plan to conduct research, going deep on the domain of your choice, then we can assure you that you will be inspired here! If you have the dreams of becoming a young entrepreneur, and wish to focus on your idea and learn the skills to convert your idea into a product and also lean on the support of mentors to stabilize your company, then we do just that!
Finally, if you are unsure of what you want to become, we will bring out the best potential hidden inside you. We will ensure your career is bright and successful.
College life is about learning and empowering yourself, having a lot of fun, making friends and bringing out the best in you.
We assure you,
Sri Eshwar will be the best four years of your life!
Inspiring Leadership
Principal Dr.Sudha Mohanram is also the Joint Managing Trustee. The leadership here is well connected to many industry professionals and senior leaders. Things move quickly around here. Decisions are taken at rapid pace for the welfare of students. Leadership team is friendly and they mentor, support and care for the holistic development of students.
Highly Qualified and Friendly Faculty
58% of our faculty members are PhDs. With such high educational qualifications, decades of experience and knowledge, our faculty members are very committed and passionate about the success of students. Needless to say, our faculty are very friendly and down to earth and always make students comfortable. Dear students,it is all about you and you only!
World Class Infrastructure
We provide world-class infrastructure, be it our labs, training facilities, or smart classrooms for students to get inspired to study. The campus feels very corporate-like, stylish, and modern. Amenities here suit the students’ needs to learn in an enriching and positive environment.
Challenging peers who inspire you to bring out your best
Students bring out the best from each other. Be it participating as a team in hackathons or working on an Innovation or Research project, team work is highly encouraged here. You will definitely find like-minded peers with whom you can begin your life-long journey as an engineer –  seeking knowledge and finding solutions to problems together.
Excellent Placement Opportunities
With over 150+ top companies visiting our campus all year round for placements, it is sure that you will be placed in the company of your choice and be placed in the range of 4L to 40L per annum. All we need from you is your hard work and a great attitude. We will do the rest!
Excellent Research opportunities
If you are interested in diving deep into academics and pursuing research, Sri Eshwar is the right place for you. With top researchers from around the world, you can receive the right mentorship and guidance, ensuring success in your chosen field.Through ongoing academic research, students also bag excellent internship opportunities at premier institutions like IIT, NIT, and CSIR, which greatly enhances their learning experience.
Study/Work Abroad Opportunities
Sri Eshwar, through its Centre for International Relations, encourages students to seek opportunities abroad to study or work. Outward mobility programs enable students to venture out  short term programs in foreign countries.The Centre for Higher Education gives extensive coaching to prepare students for overseas opportunities.
Young entrepreneur’s haven
If you have an idea to build a product and eventually start a company, Sri Eshwar can bring that idea to life with our Ignite startup accelerator. For the right ideas, we even provide financial assistance and nurture you as an entrepreneur and your product till it is safe to leave the nest.Sri Eshwar is the home of many budding entrepreneurs.
A Campus buzzing with vibrant energy
Our campus is filled with activities and events that will keep you well-balanced, happy, and active. It is a great mix of work and play, here at Sri Eshwar. Many events are conducted throughout the year, to keep students happy and relaxed.

foreign nationals - ADMISSION PROCEDURE
Admissions
BE / BTech Programmes and under Foreign Nationals Overseas Citizen of India (OCI).
Who can Apply?
Foreign National(FN)
- “Foreign National” means the Citizen of the Countries other than India who are not of Indian origin as defined under OCI.
Overseas Citizen of India (OCI)
- Overseas Citizen of India (OCI) means Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs) who were citizens of India on 26th January, 1950 or thereafter or were eligible to become citizens of India on 26th January, 1950 except who is or had been a citizen of Pakistan, Bangladesh or such other country.
Children of Indian workers in Gulf Countries (CIWGC)
- The Children of the parents who are working in Gulf Countries are eligible to apply under CIWGC.
Eligibility
Eligibility and academic Qualifications required for BE/BTech (Four Year) Degree programmes
For admission to B.E./B.Tech Courses, candidates should have completed 12 years of schooling (equivalent to 10+2 system of Indian Education). They must have studied and obtained a pass with Good Grades as per their systems of education with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics as their subjects in the qualifying examination.
Candidate should have studied in English Medium or English as one of the subjects in the qualifying Examination.
Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination, i.e. (10 + 2) of Indian System or its equivalent (completed 12 years of school education).
The Candidate should have passed in all the subjects and scored a minimum average of 45 percentage in Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry.
If the candidate has grade certificates, he/she has to produce either the actual marks or equivalent marks for the respective grades. In case equivalent mark range is given for grades by the respective examination authorities, only the minimum marks applicable to the grades in the eligible subjects (Mathematics, Physics and Chemistry) will be taken into account.
The candidate should provide equivalent mark or mark range for grades from the Principal.
The candidate has to provide a pass certificate, if it is not clear from the mark sheet whether the candidate has passed all the subjects. Mark sheets with voluminous data or confusing formats will not be accepted.
Selection Procedure
The selection is purely provisional and is subject to the confirmation from the Anna University, Directorate of Technical Education, Chennai and All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi. Since the medium of instruction is ENGLISH in Sri Eri Eshwar College of Engineering, only those candidates who have studied in the English Language medium / English as one of the subjects in the qualifying degree alone will generally be considered for admissions.
The candidates have to indicate their order of Preference of Branches of study in the application.
Mode of selection - Selection Committee will scrutinize the applications received based on eligibility criteria and intimate the applicants.
Required Documents
Candidates who are admitted under this scheme must obtain valid student visa issued by Indian missions abroad.
Passport of the candidate.
Valid student Visa / OCI card (In case of Citizen of Indian Origin).
Proof of Financial support like parents bank statement for the last six months.
School Transfer Certificate / Migration Certificate. If these certificates are not issued in the respective country, an equivalent transfer certificate from the Principal has to be specially obtained.
Mark sheets of Secondary School Leaving Certificate (X Standard) or Equivalent.
Higher Secondary Certificate (XII Standard) or equivalent* (OR)
For 8+4 type of Foreign Boards: Mark Sheets from 8th to 12th standards.
For 9+3 type of Foreign Boards: Mark Sheets from 9th to 12th standards.
* The candidate who completed Higher Secondary Course (Other than CBSE/Tamil Nadu Board) has to submit the equivalency certificate obtained from the Association of Indian Universities (AIU), New Delhi. In case of grading, lower bound of the mark ranges of a grade should be taken for calculating the percentage of marks.
